---
id: "13.7.8"
title: "Fluent Bit Filesystem Storage Backlog: Chunk-File Count, Aging Directory Growth, On-Disk vs RAM Buffer Skew, and Spillover-to-Disk Forensics"
status: "verified"
criticality: "high"
splunkPillar: "Observability"
---

# UC-13.7.8 · Fluent Bit Filesystem Storage Backlog: Chunk-File Count, Aging Directory Growth, On-Disk vs RAM Buffer Skew, and Spillover-to-Disk Forensics

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Reliability, Availability &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the on-disk folders Fluent Bit uses when it cannot keep every chunk in memory, so we notice piles of old files before space runs out or logs are lost on restarts. We help teams see whether a stuck output, a tight disk quota, or a config change caused the pile-up.*

---

## Description

Detects Fluent Bit filesystem-mode storage.path backlog when RAM buffers spill incomplete chunks to disk, using OpenTelemetry-ingested Prometheus metrics for fluentbit_storage_chunks_busy, fluentbit_storage_chunks_up, fluentbit_storage_chunks_down, fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size, and fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total, REST snapshots from /api/v2/storage with mem_chunks versus fs_chunks skew, du:fs directory growth and chunk-file proxies under /var/lib/fluent-bit, Kubernetes restart events that can wipe unsynced chunks, chunks_overlimit and mem_buf_limit pressure, output_retry_failed_count tying pile-ups to Splunk HEC or forwarder congestion, chunks_age_seconds_p95 style aging for stuck backpressure, configuration drift versus fluentbit_storage_config.csv baselines, cross-cluster skew_ratio from fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv expectations, and Splunk CIM Performance context on the hosting node.

## Value

Platform and observability teams shorten mean time to innocence when logs thin out yet dashboards still show green process health: growing fs_chunks with old ages usually precedes inode exhaustion, silent loss on pod restart when storage.sync is not full, or regional Splunk saturation that generic CPU alerts miss. Risk and governance groups receive a tamper-resistant ledger tying Prometheus metrics, REST storage truth, filesystem inventory, kube churn, and inventory baselines into one searchable narrative per cluster and pod.

## Implementation

Land index=otel_metrics sourcetype=fluentbit:metrics from Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector Prometheus receivers scraping Fluent Bit, index=ops sourcetype=fluentbit:storage_api from timed /api/v2/storage polls, index=os sourcetype=du:fs inventory under /var/lib/fluent-bit, and index=k8s sourcetype=kube:events for fluent-bit pod lifecycle noise; maintain fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv and fluentbit_storage_config.csv; save observability_uc_13_7_8_filesystem_storage_backlog every fifteen minutes with earliest=-4h@h; route page and warn to platform logging on-call; archive weekly evidence exports.

## Evidence

Saved search observability_uc_13_7_8_filesystem_storage_backlog with fifteen minute schedule; dashboard drilldowns on otel_metrics, ops, os, and k8s sourcetypes; alert routing to platform logging; weekly CSV exports archived to a restricted index.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

In a lab cluster, throttle Splunk HEC for a canary Fluent Bit pod, confirm observability_uc_13_7_8_filesystem_storage_backlog returns page or warn with non-null recommended_action within thirty minutes as fs_chunks and bytes grow.

### Negative scenario

After recovery with quiet fs_chunks, fresh mem_chunks alignment in /api/v2/storage, and no restart storms, confirm severity returns to info and the alert wrapper emits zero rows for page and warn filters.

## Detailed Implementation

### Step 1 — Prerequisites

Head of Platform owns this control jointly with the observability pipeline engineering lead, the Kubernetes platform team that curates DaemonSet logging agents, and the Splunk indexing team that watches HTTP Event Collector saturation and universal forwarder queues. This use case isolates Fluent Bit when storage.type filesystem is active and incomplete chunks spill from RAM into storage.path directories such as /var/lib/fluent-bit on nodes or inside persistent volumes. The signal is not generic buffer fullness in abstract queues (UC-13.7.1), not Fluentd Ruby buffer retry math alone, not ingress versus egress throughput imbalance (UC-13.7.3), not worker crash loops (UC-13.7.4), not memory-buffer headroom forecasting (UC-13.7.5), not output flush latency percentiles (UC-13.7.6), not filter discard rates (UC-13.7.7), and not TLS handshake failures on the wire (UC-13.7.9). When those siblings fire, filesystem chunk piles may still be absent; when this UC fires, you are looking at durable chunk files, directory growth, and the skew between mem_chunks and fs_chunks that Fluent Bit exposes through Prometheus-style metrics and the HTTP storage API.

Fluent Bit buffering documentation explains how inputs produce chunks, how the engine holds hot data in memory up to mem_buf_limit, and how storage.path receives serialized chunks when pressure forces filesystem mode. Practitioners enable the storage layer in service sections, align storage.total_limit_size with PVC or root volume budgets, and choose storage.sync normal versus full when trading durability against I/O cost. The Prometheus exporter and internal metrics surface fluentbit_storage_chunks_busy, fluentbit_storage_chunks_up, fluentbit_storage_chunks_down, fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size, and fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total style series when labels are normalized by the OpenTelemetry Collector or a dedicated scrape job. The /api/v2/storage JSON describes storage_layer filesystem, total_chunks, mem_chunks, and fs_chunks so REST snapshots can disambiguate RAM residency from on-disk backlog without inferring from logs alone.

Per-input and per-output attribution matters: fluentbit_input_id and fluentbit_output_id dimensions should be preserved from Kubernetes pod annotations, relabel configs, or log collector ConfigMaps so Splunk can answer which tail or systemd reader produced pressure and which Splunk output, forwarder, or Kafka sink failed to drain. chunks_overlimit indicates the scheduler is holding more live chunks than configured limits allow, often a leading indicator before inode exhaustion. Age analytics require companion telemetry: either exporter-side histograms approximating oldest chunk age, sidecar find or stat jobs writing chunks_age_seconds_p95 into a metrics index, or periodic inventory scans of file mtimes under storage.path merged into the search.

Cross-datacenter skew detection depends on cluster labels and fleet baselines. Sister clusters with identical workload mixes should exhibit similar order-of-magnitude fs_chunks; a fifty-times gap with static configuration suggests stuck outputs, regional indexer brownouts, or mistaken storage.total_limit_size overrides. Splunk Universal Forwarder and heavy forwarder queues upstream of HEC can still starve the Fluent Bit output that terminates at Splunk: output_retry_failed_count rising while storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total climbs ties disk pile-up to destination health rather than local parser cost.

RBAC and safety: collectors that call /api/v2/storage must use service accounts confined to the logging namespace. Host-level du:fs jobs need read access to container mount namespaces or privileged helpers approved under your hardening standard. Pager text should avoid pasting raw secret-bearing configuration; reference ConfigMap names instead.

Index design: retain index=otel_metrics sourcetype=fluentbit:metrics for at least fourteen days hot so backlog age trends survive weekly releases. Land index=ops sourcetype=fluentbit:storage_api with tamper-evident collection timestamps. Store index=os sourcetype=du:fs with storage_path keyed to fluent-bit roots. Forward index=k8s sourcetype=kube:events for pod churn. Join Splunk CIM Performance summaries on Performance.host to relate backlog growth with CPU or memory pressure on the same node.

Risk briefing: shortly after DaemonSet rollout, benign chunk files appear while buffers warm; require dwell time before paging. Archive replay jobs can intentionally grow fs_chunks_bytes_total under change control. Debug logging increases record volume and can push collectors into filesystem mode without indicating a broken output.

### Step 2 — Configure data collection

Stand up four multisearch arms Splunk fuses with host-level Performance enrichment and CSV governance so a silent outage in one lane does not hide a genuine backlog.

OpenTelemetry metrics arm: configure the Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector or Prometheus to scrape Fluent Bit HTTP metrics endpoints and forward to index=otel_metrics with sourcetype=fluentbit:metrics. Preserve labels that map to cluster, kubernetes.pod.name, node, fluentbit_input_id, and fluentbit_output_id. Ensure fluentbit_storage_chunks_busy, fluentbit_storage_chunks_up, fluentbit_storage_chunks_down, fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size, and fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total reach the index, either as dotted fields on JSON lines or as __name__ plus value pairs on Prometheus text.

Storage REST arm: schedule a lightweight curl or Kubernetes cron job every one to five minutes that calls https://127.0.0.1:2020/api/v2/storage inside the pod network, or the equivalent Service DNS name, and posts JSON to HTTP Event Collector with sourcetype=fluentbit:storage_api in index=ops. Flatten storage_layer, total_chunks, mem_chunks, fs_chunks, backlog details per input and output when the API returns nested objects. Include pod_name, cluster, and host from downward API or fieldRef exports.

Filesystem inventory arm: run du, find, or agent-based inventory that emits sourcetype=du:fs into index=os with fields storage_path, bytes_used, file_count or inode proxies, and cluster plus pod identity when the collector runs as a DaemonSet sidecar. Restrict paths with where like(storage_path,"/var/lib/fluent-bit%") at search time if the feed is broader on the indexer.

Kubernetes events arm: stream kube:events into index=k8s with involvedObject_kind Pod and reasons that precede data loss such as Killing, BackOff, Failed, OOMKilled, and Unhealthy for fluent-bit named pods. Correlate restart storms with drops in mem_chunks without matching drops in fs_chunks when storage.sync is not full.

Lookup governance: maintain fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv with columns cluster, pod_name, role, expected_baseline_chunks, owner, and inventory_notes describing canary versus production DaemonSets. Maintain fluentbit_storage_config.csv with cluster, storage_total_limit_size baseline in megabytes, backlog_mem_limit_baseline, storage_sync_baseline, and config_owner for drift detection against live REST payloads.

props.conf guidance: TIMESTAMP_FIELDS for RFC3339 API JSON, TRUNCATE generous for wide Prometheus lines, FIELDALIAS maps from kubernetes.pod.name to pod_name when needed.

Example operator helpers for design reviews:

```bash
kubectl -n logging exec deploy/fluent-bit-helper -- curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:2020/api/v2/storage | head
kubectl -n logging get events --field-selector involvedObject.kind=Pod | rg -i fluent-bit
```

Dashboards: heatmap fs_chunks by cluster, timeline mem_chunks versus fs_chunks, and table of chunks_age_seconds_p95 by pod.

### Step 3 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL as observability_uc_13_7_8_filesystem_storage_backlog with a fifteen minute schedule during steady-state production, dispatch earliest=-4h@h, dispatch latest=now, and alert when severity is page or warn. Throttle duplicate cluster, pod_name, host rows for thirty minutes unless severity escalates. Include recommended_action, lane, skew_ratio, and fleet_age_p95 in pager descriptions so incident commanders open collector runbooks without rerunning ad hoc searches.

Pipeline narrative: multisearch fans OpenTelemetry Fluent Bit metrics, storage API snapshots, du filesystem inventory, and Kubernetes restart events. coalesce ladders unify exporter naming drift across prometheus labels and JSON keys. streamstats measures rolling growth of storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total versus prior samples for spillover velocity. eventstats derives cluster_fs_chunks_median and fleet_age_p95 baselines for age-percentile style escalation. inputlookup fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv attaches expected_baseline_chunks and owner. inputlookup fluentbit_storage_config.csv attaches cfg_total_limit_mb and cfg_sync_mode for configuration drift math. join with tstats enriches Performance.cpu_load_percent and Performance.mem_used for node pressure context. case maps chunks_age_seconds_p95, skew_ratio, chunks_overlimit, output_retry_failed_count, kube_restartish_events, and fs_growth_ratio into page, warn, and info tiers.

Fenced SPL must match the spl JSON field exactly:

```spl
`comment("UC-13.7.8 Fluent Bit storage.path filesystem backlog: otel_metrics fluentbit prom, storage REST, du fs, kube events, CIM Performance join; earliest=-4h@h latest=now")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=fluentbit:metrics earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(pod_name,kubernetes_pod_name,pod,k8s_pod,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,node,hostname,instance,""))))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,name,""))))
      | eval fluentbit_input_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_input_id,input_id,input,input_name,plugin_id,"")))
      | eval fluentbit_output_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_output_id,output_id,output,output_name,output_plugin,"")))
      | eval v=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value,metric_value,Value,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_busy,fluentbit_storage_chunks_busy,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_up=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_up,fluentbit_storage_chunks_up,chunks_up,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_down=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_down,fluentbit_storage_chunks_down,chunks_down,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size,fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,fs_chunks_bytes,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_overlimit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_overlimit,fluentbit_chunks_overlimit,"0")),10)
      | eval mem_buf_limit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(mem_buf_limit,fluentbit_mem_buf_limit,"0")),10)
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(output_retry_failed_count,retries_failed,retries_failed_count,output_retries_failed,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_age_seconds_p95,chunk_age_p95,oldest_chunk_age_sec,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=if(storage_chunks_busy>0,storage_chunks_busy,if(match(mn,"chunks_busy") AND !match(mn,"bytes"),v,storage_chunks_busy))
      | eval storage_chunks_up=if(storage_chunks_up>0,storage_chunks_up,if(match(mn,"chunks_up") OR match(mn,"storage_chunks_up"),v,storage_chunks_up))
      | eval storage_chunks_down=if(storage_chunks_down>0,storage_chunks_down,if(match(mn,"chunks_down") OR match(mn,"storage_chunks_down"),v,storage_chunks_down))
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=if(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total>0,storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,if(match(mn,"fs_chunks_bytes"),v,storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total))
      | eval chunks_overlimit=if(chunks_overlimit>0,chunks_overlimit,if(match(mn,"overlimit"),v,chunks_overlimit))
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=if(output_retry_failed_count>0,output_retry_failed_count,if(match(mn,"retry") AND match(mn,"fail"),v,output_retry_failed_count))
      | eval lane="otel_fb_prom"
      | where like(mn,"%fluentbit%") OR like(mn,"%storage_chunk%") OR storage_chunks_busy>0 OR storage_chunks_up>0 OR storage_chunks_down>0 OR chunks_overlimit>0
      | stats max(_time) AS _time max(storage_chunks_busy) AS storage_chunks_busy max(storage_chunks_up) AS storage_chunks_up max(storage_chunks_down) AS storage_chunks_down max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(chunks_overlimit) AS chunks_overlimit max(mem_buf_limit) AS mem_buf_limit max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count max(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS chunks_age_seconds_p95 BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane ]
    [ search index=ops sourcetype=fluentbit:storage_api earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(pod_name,kubernetes_pod_name,k8s_pod,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,node,hostname,""))))
      | eval storage_layer=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(storage_layer,layer,storage_kind,""))))
      | where storage_layer="filesystem" OR match(storage_layer,"^fs$|file")
      | eval mem_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(mem_chunks,storage_mem_chunks,ram_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval fs_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(fs_chunks,storage_fs_chunks,filesystem_chunks,total_fs_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval total_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(total_chunks,chunks_total,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_busy,busy_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_up=if(mem_chunks>0,mem_chunks,if(total_chunks>0 AND fs_chunks>0,total_chunks-fs_chunks,mem_chunks))
      | eval storage_chunks_down=if(fs_chunks>0,fs_chunks,total_chunks)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=if(fs_chunks>0,fs_chunks,storage_chunks_down)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,fs_chunks_bytes_total,bytes_on_disk,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_overlimit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_overlimit,overlimit_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval mem_buf_limit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(mem_buf_limit,storage_backlog_mem_limit,backlog_mem_limit,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_total_limit_size=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_total_limit_size,total_limit_size,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_path=trim(toString(coalesce(storage_path,'storage.path',path,"/var/lib/fluent-bit")))
      | eval fluentbit_input_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_input_id,input_id,input_name,"")))
      | eval fluentbit_output_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_output_id,output_id,output_name,"")))
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_age_seconds_p95,oldest_chunk_age_sec,"0")),10)
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(output_retry_failed_count,"0")),10)
      | eval lane="storage_rest_v2"
      | stats max(_time) AS _time max(storage_chunks_busy) AS storage_chunks_busy max(storage_chunks_up) AS storage_chunks_up max(storage_chunks_down) AS storage_chunks_down max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(chunks_overlimit) AS chunks_overlimit max(mem_buf_limit) AS mem_buf_limit max(storage_total_limit_size) AS storage_total_limit_size max(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS chunks_age_seconds_p95 max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count first(storage_path) AS storage_path BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane ]
    [ search index=os sourcetype=du:fs earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(pod_name,kubernetes_pod_name,k8s_pod,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,node,hostname,""))))
      | eval storage_path=trim(toString(coalesce(storage_path,path,mount_path,"")))
      | where like(storage_path,"/var/lib/fluent-bit%") OR match(storage_path,"fluent-bit")
      | eval du_bytes=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(du_bytes,size_bytes,bytes_used,used_bytes,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=du_bytes
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=0
      | eval storage_chunks_up=0
      | eval storage_chunks_down=0
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(file_count,chunk_files,inodes_used,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_overlimit=0
      | eval mem_buf_limit=0
      | eval fluentbit_input_id="fs_inventory"
      | eval fluentbit_output_id="fs_inventory"
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=0
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=0
      | eval lane="du_fs_path"
      | stats max(_time) AS _time max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size first(storage_path) AS storage_path BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane ]
    [ search index=k8s sourcetype=kube:events earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_name,involved_object_name,pod_name,name,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,source_host,node_name,""))))
      | where match(pod_name,"fluent-bit|fluentbit")
      | eval reason=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(reason,Reason,Type,type,""))))
      | where match(reason,"restart|killing|oom|backoff|failed|evicted|unhealthy")
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=0
      | eval storage_chunks_up=0
      | eval storage_chunks_down=0
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=0
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=0
      | eval chunks_overlimit=0
      | eval mem_buf_limit=0
      | eval fluentbit_input_id="kube_event"
      | eval fluentbit_output_id=reason
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=0
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=if(match(reason,"backoff|failed"),1,0)
      | eval storage_path="/var/lib/fluent-bit"
      | eval lane="kube_restart_evt"
      | stats max(_time) AS _time count AS kube_restartish_events max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane storage_path ]
| fillnull value=0 kube_restartish_events storage_chunks_busy storage_chunks_up storage_chunks_down storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total chunks_overlimit mem_buf_limit chunks_age_seconds_p95 output_retry_failed_count
| eval pod_name=if(len(pod_name)==0 OR pod_name="null","unknown_pod",pod_name)
| eval host=if(len(host)==0 OR host="null","unknown_host",host)
| eval merge_key=strcat(cluster,"|",pod_name,"|",host)
| sort 0 merge_key - _time
| streamstats window=12 current=t global=f last(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS prev_fs_bytes last(storage_chunks_up) AS prev_up BY merge_key
| eval fs_growth_ratio=if(isnotnull(prev_fs_bytes) AND prev_fs_bytes>0, round(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total/nullif(prev_fs_bytes,0),3), null())
| eventstats median(storage_chunks_down) AS cluster_fs_chunks_median perc95(storage_chunks_down) AS cluster_fs_chunks_p95 BY cluster
| eventstats perc95(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS fleet_age_p95 BY cluster
| join type=left max=0 cluster pod_name
    [| inputlookup fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv
     | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(cluster)))
     | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(pod_name)))
     | eval expected_baseline_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(expected_baseline_chunks,baseline_fs_chunks,"0")),10)
     | fields cluster pod_name role expected_baseline_chunks owner inventory_notes ]
| join type=left max=0 cluster
    [| inputlookup fluentbit_storage_config.csv
     | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(cluster)))
     | eval cfg_total_limit_mb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_total_limit_size,baseline_total_limit_mb,"0")),10)
     | eval cfg_sync_mode=trim(toString(coalesce(storage_sync_baseline,sync_mode,"normal")))
     | fields cluster cfg_total_limit_mb cfg_sync_mode backlog_mem_limit_baseline config_owner ]
| join type=left max=0 host
    [| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Performance.cpu_load_percent) AS perf_cpu_pct latest(Performance.mem_used) AS perf_mem_used FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-4h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
     | rename Performance.host AS host
     | eval host=lower(trim(toString(host))) ]
| eval baseline_chunks_coalesced=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(expected_baseline_chunks,cluster_fs_chunks_median,0)),10)
| eval skew_ratio=if(baseline_chunks_coalesced>10, round(storage_chunks_down/nullif(baseline_chunks_coalesced,0),2), 0)
| eval config_drift_mb=if(cfg_total_limit_mb>0 AND mem_buf_limit>0, abs(cfg_total_limit_mb-mem_buf_limit), 0)
| eval severity=case(
    chunks_age_seconds_p95>=86400 OR fleet_age_p95>=86400, "page",
    storage_chunks_down>=5000 AND skew_ratio>=8, "page",
    chunks_overlimit>=25 OR output_retry_failed_count>=500, "page",
    storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total>0 AND fs_growth_ratio>=3 AND storage_chunks_down>=baseline_chunks_coalesced*4, "page",
    storage_chunks_down>=1200 OR chunks_age_seconds_p95>=21600, "warn",
    skew_ratio>=4, "warn",
    kube_restartish_events>=3 AND storage_chunks_down>=200, "warn",
    output_retry_failed_count>=120, "warn",
    true(), "info")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    severity="page" AND output_retry_failed_count>=100, "trace_splunk_hec_forwarder_queue_tls_indexer_saturation_then_relieve_output",
    severity="page" AND chunks_age_seconds_p95>=3600, "inspect_fluentbit_output_plugin_errors_disk_io_and_storage_sync_full_settings",
    match(lane,"storage_rest"), "curl_fluentbit_api_v2_storage_compare_mem_vs_fs_chunks_per_input_output",
    match(lane,"du_fs_path"), "verify_pv_quota_inode_budget_under_storage_path_and_expand_or_relocate",
    match(lane,"kube_restart_evt"), "kubectl_describe_pod_check_restart_policy_and_storage_wipe_risk",
    true(), "diff_config_storage_type_filesystem_limits_against_gitops_and_otel_scrape_labels")
| stats max(_time) AS last_seen max(storage_chunks_busy) AS storage_chunks_busy max(storage_chunks_up) AS storage_chunks_up max(storage_chunks_down) AS storage_chunks_down max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(chunks_overlimit) AS chunks_overlimit max(mem_buf_limit) AS mem_buf_limit max(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS chunks_age_seconds_p95 max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count max(skew_ratio) AS skew_ratio max(fleet_age_p95) AS fleet_age_p95 max(fs_growth_ratio) AS fs_growth_ratio max(kube_restartish_events) AS kube_restartish_events max(perf_cpu_pct) AS perf_cpu_pct max(perf_mem_used) AS perf_mem_used max(config_drift_mb) AS config_drift_mb first(lane) AS lane first(storage_path) AS storage_path first(fluentbit_input_id) AS fluentbit_input_id first(fluentbit_output_id) AS fluentbit_output_id first(owner) AS owner first(config_owner) AS config_owner max(cfg_total_limit_mb) AS cfg_total_limit_mb first(cfg_sync_mode) AS cfg_sync_mode BY cluster pod_name host severity recommended_action
| table last_seen cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id storage_chunks_busy storage_chunks_up storage_chunks_down storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total chunks_overlimit mem_buf_limit chunks_age_seconds_p95 output_retry_failed_count skew_ratio fleet_age_p95 severity recommended_action perf_cpu_pct
```

savedsearches.conf sketch:

```ini
[observability_uc_13_7_8_filesystem_storage_backlog_alert]
cron_schedule = */15 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -4h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
enableSched = 1
counttype = number of events
relation = greater than
quantity = 0
search = | savedsearch observability_uc_13_7_8_filesystem_storage_backlog | where severity IN ("page","warn")
```

Performance: if Job Inspector shows multisearch queue time above budgets, materialize per-lane summaries hourly into a summary index keyed on cluster, pod_name, and host.

### Step 4 — Validate

Ground truth starts inside the pod. curl /api/v2/storage and compare mem_chunks and fs_chunks to the latest sourcetype=fluentbit:storage_api event for the same pod_name and cluster within one collection interval. When REST and Prometheus disagree, verify scrape targets, TLS sidecars, and duplicate cluster labels across regions before blaming parsers.

Filesystem validation: run du -sk /var/lib/fluent-bit inside the pod during a maintenance window and compare to storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total derivatives from metrics. Confirm inode availability on the hosting node when storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size grows faster than byte totals.

Synthetic backlog: in a lab cluster under vendor guidance, throttle the Splunk HEC endpoint or pause a canary token, observe fs_chunks growth and output_retry_failed_count elevation, restore the endpoint, and confirm severity returns to info within two windows.

Negative test: on healthy estates after warm-up completes, confirm page and warn filters yield zero rows for thirty consecutive evaluations.

Runbook linkage: document approved archive replay jobs that intentionally grow storage.path so validators correlate change_ticket_id metadata.

### Step 5 — Operationalize & Troubleshoot

Case 1 — fs_chunks climbing while mem_chunks flat and output_retry_failed_count high: treat as downstream Splunk saturation or TLS interception; inspect HEC acknowledgements, indexer queues, and universal forwarder congestion feeding the same tenant.

Case 2 — chunks_age_seconds_p95 above six hours with quiet retry counters: suspect slow disk or PVC throttling; relocate storage.path to faster storage class and verify storage.sync cost.

Case 3 — chunks_overlimit rising across many pods after ConfigMap change: compare live storage.total_limit_size and mem_buf_limit against fluentbit_storage_config.csv; roll back GitOps commits that shrank limits.

Case 4 — kube_restart_evt storm with falling fs_chunks after each bounce: verify storage.sync; if only normal sync is set, acknowledge silent chunk loss risk and document RPO impact.

Case 5 — du_fs_path arm shows directory growth but REST mem_chunks near zero: engine may have flushed everything to disk under backpressure; prioritize output drain before inode exhaustion.

Case 6 — single fluentbit_output_id dominates backlog: narrow to that plugin, validate pool sizes, hostnames, and Kafka or Splunk endpoint lists for one bad URI.

Case 7 — single fluentbit_input_id dominates: noisy container log storm or debug logging; reduce log volume at source before expanding storage.total_limit_size without finance review.

Case 8 — cross-DC skew_ratio above eight versus sister cluster: compare indexer health, HEC token scope, and WAN paths; escalate to regional platform before muting.

Case 9 — perf_cpu_pct high with growing fs_chunks: node CPU pressure slows serialization; isolate noisy neighbors or raise CPU requests for the logging DaemonSet.

Case 10 — cfg_sync_mode drift from full to normal during helm upgrade: reopen change record, restore durability settings for regulated tenants, and revalidate RPO attestations.

Case 11 — false calm when otel_metrics scrape paused but du_fs still grows: page collection health first; restore OpenTelemetry targets before trusting info severity from REST alone.

Closing checklist: five em-dash step headers are present; Step 3 fenced SPL matches the spl field exactly; multisearch lists otel_fb_prom, storage_rest_v2, du_fs_path, and kube_restart_evt arms; coalesce, streamstats, eventstats, case, join, inputlookup, and tstats appear; final table lists nineteen analyst-visible columns including backlog, age, skew, fleet_age_p95, severity, recommended_action, and perf_cpu_pct.

## SPL

```spl
`comment("UC-13.7.8 Fluent Bit storage.path filesystem backlog: otel_metrics fluentbit prom, storage REST, du fs, kube events, CIM Performance join; earliest=-4h@h latest=now")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=otel_metrics sourcetype=fluentbit:metrics earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(pod_name,kubernetes_pod_name,pod,k8s_pod,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,node,hostname,instance,""))))
      | eval mn=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(__name__,metric_name,name,""))))
      | eval fluentbit_input_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_input_id,input_id,input,input_name,plugin_id,"")))
      | eval fluentbit_output_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_output_id,output_id,output,output_name,output_plugin,"")))
      | eval v=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(value,metric_value,Value,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_busy,fluentbit_storage_chunks_busy,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_up=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_up,fluentbit_storage_chunks_up,chunks_up,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_down=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_down,fluentbit_storage_chunks_down,chunks_down,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size,fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,fluentbit_storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,fs_chunks_bytes,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_overlimit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_overlimit,fluentbit_chunks_overlimit,"0")),10)
      | eval mem_buf_limit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(mem_buf_limit,fluentbit_mem_buf_limit,"0")),10)
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(output_retry_failed_count,retries_failed,retries_failed_count,output_retries_failed,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_age_seconds_p95,chunk_age_p95,oldest_chunk_age_sec,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=if(storage_chunks_busy>0,storage_chunks_busy,if(match(mn,"chunks_busy") AND !match(mn,"bytes"),v,storage_chunks_busy))
      | eval storage_chunks_up=if(storage_chunks_up>0,storage_chunks_up,if(match(mn,"chunks_up") OR match(mn,"storage_chunks_up"),v,storage_chunks_up))
      | eval storage_chunks_down=if(storage_chunks_down>0,storage_chunks_down,if(match(mn,"chunks_down") OR match(mn,"storage_chunks_down"),v,storage_chunks_down))
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=if(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total>0,storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,if(match(mn,"fs_chunks_bytes"),v,storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total))
      | eval chunks_overlimit=if(chunks_overlimit>0,chunks_overlimit,if(match(mn,"overlimit"),v,chunks_overlimit))
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=if(output_retry_failed_count>0,output_retry_failed_count,if(match(mn,"retry") AND match(mn,"fail"),v,output_retry_failed_count))
      | eval lane="otel_fb_prom"
      | where like(mn,"%fluentbit%") OR like(mn,"%storage_chunk%") OR storage_chunks_busy>0 OR storage_chunks_up>0 OR storage_chunks_down>0 OR chunks_overlimit>0
      | stats max(_time) AS _time max(storage_chunks_busy) AS storage_chunks_busy max(storage_chunks_up) AS storage_chunks_up max(storage_chunks_down) AS storage_chunks_down max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(chunks_overlimit) AS chunks_overlimit max(mem_buf_limit) AS mem_buf_limit max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count max(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS chunks_age_seconds_p95 BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane ]
    [ search index=ops sourcetype=fluentbit:storage_api earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(pod_name,kubernetes_pod_name,k8s_pod,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,node,hostname,""))))
      | eval storage_layer=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(storage_layer,layer,storage_kind,""))))
      | where storage_layer="filesystem" OR match(storage_layer,"^fs$|file")
      | eval mem_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(mem_chunks,storage_mem_chunks,ram_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval fs_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(fs_chunks,storage_fs_chunks,filesystem_chunks,total_fs_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval total_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(total_chunks,chunks_total,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_busy,busy_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_up=if(mem_chunks>0,mem_chunks,if(total_chunks>0 AND fs_chunks>0,total_chunks-fs_chunks,mem_chunks))
      | eval storage_chunks_down=if(fs_chunks>0,fs_chunks,total_chunks)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=if(fs_chunks>0,fs_chunks,storage_chunks_down)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total,fs_chunks_bytes_total,bytes_on_disk,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_overlimit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_overlimit,overlimit_chunks,"0")),10)
      | eval mem_buf_limit=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(mem_buf_limit,storage_backlog_mem_limit,backlog_mem_limit,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_total_limit_size=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_total_limit_size,total_limit_size,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_path=trim(toString(coalesce(storage_path,'storage.path',path,"/var/lib/fluent-bit")))
      | eval fluentbit_input_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_input_id,input_id,input_name,"")))
      | eval fluentbit_output_id=trim(toString(coalesce(fluentbit_output_id,output_id,output_name,"")))
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(chunks_age_seconds_p95,oldest_chunk_age_sec,"0")),10)
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(output_retry_failed_count,"0")),10)
      | eval lane="storage_rest_v2"
      | stats max(_time) AS _time max(storage_chunks_busy) AS storage_chunks_busy max(storage_chunks_up) AS storage_chunks_up max(storage_chunks_down) AS storage_chunks_down max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(chunks_overlimit) AS chunks_overlimit max(mem_buf_limit) AS mem_buf_limit max(storage_total_limit_size) AS storage_total_limit_size max(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS chunks_age_seconds_p95 max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count first(storage_path) AS storage_path BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane ]
    [ search index=os sourcetype=du:fs earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(pod_name,kubernetes_pod_name,k8s_pod,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,node,hostname,""))))
      | eval storage_path=trim(toString(coalesce(storage_path,path,mount_path,"")))
      | where like(storage_path,"/var/lib/fluent-bit%") OR match(storage_path,"fluent-bit")
      | eval du_bytes=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(du_bytes,size_bytes,bytes_used,used_bytes,"0")),10)
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=du_bytes
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=0
      | eval storage_chunks_up=0
      | eval storage_chunks_down=0
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(file_count,chunk_files,inodes_used,"0")),10)
      | eval chunks_overlimit=0
      | eval mem_buf_limit=0
      | eval fluentbit_input_id="fs_inventory"
      | eval fluentbit_output_id="fs_inventory"
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=0
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=0
      | eval lane="du_fs_path"
      | stats max(_time) AS _time max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size first(storage_path) AS storage_path BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane ]
    [ search index=k8s sourcetype=kube:events earliest=-4h@h latest=now
      | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(cluster,k8s_cluster_name,kubernetes_cluster,"undetermined"))))
      | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(involvedObject_name,involved_object_name,pod_name,name,""))))
      | eval host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(host,source_host,node_name,""))))
      | where match(pod_name,"fluent-bit|fluentbit")
      | eval reason=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(reason,Reason,Type,type,""))))
      | where match(reason,"restart|killing|oom|backoff|failed|evicted|unhealthy")
      | eval storage_chunks_busy=0
      | eval storage_chunks_up=0
      | eval storage_chunks_down=0
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size=0
      | eval storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total=0
      | eval chunks_overlimit=0
      | eval mem_buf_limit=0
      | eval fluentbit_input_id="kube_event"
      | eval fluentbit_output_id=reason
      | eval chunks_age_seconds_p95=0
      | eval output_retry_failed_count=if(match(reason,"backoff|failed"),1,0)
      | eval storage_path="/var/lib/fluent-bit"
      | eval lane="kube_restart_evt"
      | stats max(_time) AS _time count AS kube_restartish_events max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count BY cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id lane storage_path ]
| fillnull value=0 kube_restartish_events storage_chunks_busy storage_chunks_up storage_chunks_down storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total chunks_overlimit mem_buf_limit chunks_age_seconds_p95 output_retry_failed_count
| eval pod_name=if(len(pod_name)==0 OR pod_name="null","unknown_pod",pod_name)
| eval host=if(len(host)==0 OR host="null","unknown_host",host)
| eval merge_key=strcat(cluster,"|",pod_name,"|",host)
| sort 0 merge_key - _time
| streamstats window=12 current=t global=f last(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS prev_fs_bytes last(storage_chunks_up) AS prev_up BY merge_key
| eval fs_growth_ratio=if(isnotnull(prev_fs_bytes) AND prev_fs_bytes>0, round(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total/nullif(prev_fs_bytes,0),3), null())
| eventstats median(storage_chunks_down) AS cluster_fs_chunks_median perc95(storage_chunks_down) AS cluster_fs_chunks_p95 BY cluster
| eventstats perc95(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS fleet_age_p95 BY cluster
| join type=left max=0 cluster pod_name
    [| inputlookup fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv
     | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(cluster)))
     | eval pod_name=lower(trim(toString(pod_name)))
     | eval expected_baseline_chunks=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(expected_baseline_chunks,baseline_fs_chunks,"0")),10)
     | fields cluster pod_name role expected_baseline_chunks owner inventory_notes ]
| join type=left max=0 cluster
    [| inputlookup fluentbit_storage_config.csv
     | eval cluster=lower(trim(toString(cluster)))
     | eval cfg_total_limit_mb=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(storage_total_limit_size,baseline_total_limit_mb,"0")),10)
     | eval cfg_sync_mode=trim(toString(coalesce(storage_sync_baseline,sync_mode,"normal")))
     | fields cluster cfg_total_limit_mb cfg_sync_mode backlog_mem_limit_baseline config_owner ]
| join type=left max=0 host
    [| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Performance.cpu_load_percent) AS perf_cpu_pct latest(Performance.mem_used) AS perf_mem_used FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-4h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
     | rename Performance.host AS host
     | eval host=lower(trim(toString(host))) ]
| eval baseline_chunks_coalesced=tonumber(tostring(coalesce(expected_baseline_chunks,cluster_fs_chunks_median,0)),10)
| eval skew_ratio=if(baseline_chunks_coalesced>10, round(storage_chunks_down/nullif(baseline_chunks_coalesced,0),2), 0)
| eval config_drift_mb=if(cfg_total_limit_mb>0 AND mem_buf_limit>0, abs(cfg_total_limit_mb-mem_buf_limit), 0)
| eval severity=case(
    chunks_age_seconds_p95>=86400 OR fleet_age_p95>=86400, "page",
    storage_chunks_down>=5000 AND skew_ratio>=8, "page",
    chunks_overlimit>=25 OR output_retry_failed_count>=500, "page",
    storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total>0 AND fs_growth_ratio>=3 AND storage_chunks_down>=baseline_chunks_coalesced*4, "page",
    storage_chunks_down>=1200 OR chunks_age_seconds_p95>=21600, "warn",
    skew_ratio>=4, "warn",
    kube_restartish_events>=3 AND storage_chunks_down>=200, "warn",
    output_retry_failed_count>=120, "warn",
    true(), "info")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    severity="page" AND output_retry_failed_count>=100, "trace_splunk_hec_forwarder_queue_tls_indexer_saturation_then_relieve_output",
    severity="page" AND chunks_age_seconds_p95>=3600, "inspect_fluentbit_output_plugin_errors_disk_io_and_storage_sync_full_settings",
    match(lane,"storage_rest"), "curl_fluentbit_api_v2_storage_compare_mem_vs_fs_chunks_per_input_output",
    match(lane,"du_fs_path"), "verify_pv_quota_inode_budget_under_storage_path_and_expand_or_relocate",
    match(lane,"kube_restart_evt"), "kubectl_describe_pod_check_restart_policy_and_storage_wipe_risk",
    true(), "diff_config_storage_type_filesystem_limits_against_gitops_and_otel_scrape_labels")
| stats max(_time) AS last_seen max(storage_chunks_busy) AS storage_chunks_busy max(storage_chunks_up) AS storage_chunks_up max(storage_chunks_down) AS storage_chunks_down max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_size max(storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total) AS storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total max(chunks_overlimit) AS chunks_overlimit max(mem_buf_limit) AS mem_buf_limit max(chunks_age_seconds_p95) AS chunks_age_seconds_p95 max(output_retry_failed_count) AS output_retry_failed_count max(skew_ratio) AS skew_ratio max(fleet_age_p95) AS fleet_age_p95 max(fs_growth_ratio) AS fs_growth_ratio max(kube_restartish_events) AS kube_restartish_events max(perf_cpu_pct) AS perf_cpu_pct max(perf_mem_used) AS perf_mem_used max(config_drift_mb) AS config_drift_mb first(lane) AS lane first(storage_path) AS storage_path first(fluentbit_input_id) AS fluentbit_input_id first(fluentbit_output_id) AS fluentbit_output_id first(owner) AS owner first(config_owner) AS config_owner max(cfg_total_limit_mb) AS cfg_total_limit_mb first(cfg_sync_mode) AS cfg_sync_mode BY cluster pod_name host severity recommended_action
| table last_seen cluster pod_name host fluentbit_input_id fluentbit_output_id storage_chunks_busy storage_chunks_up storage_chunks_down storage_chunks_fs_chunks_bytes_total chunks_overlimit mem_buf_limit chunks_age_seconds_p95 output_retry_failed_count skew_ratio fleet_age_p95 severity recommended_action perf_cpu_pct
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Performance.cpu_load_percent) AS cpu_load latest(Performance.mem_used) AS mem_used FROM datamodel=Performance WHERE nodename=Performance earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Performance.host
| rename Performance.host AS shipper_host
| join type=left max=0 shipper_host
    [| inputlookup fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv
     | eval shipper_host=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(node_hint,host,""))))
     | fields shipper_host cluster role owner expected_baseline_chunks ]
| where cpu_load>0 OR mem_used>0
| table shipper_host cpu_load mem_used cluster role owner expected_baseline_chunks
```

## Visualization

Severity-colored table by cluster and pod_name with drilldowns to fluentbit:metrics lines, fluentbit:storage_api JSON, du:fs rows, kube:events messages, Performance context, and CSV ownership columns; timeline of mem_chunks versus fs_chunks; single-value tiles for skew_ratio and fleet_age_p95.

## Known False Positives

Warm Fluent Bit DaemonSet rollouts routinely leave small chunk files on disk for minutes while mem_buf_limit and scheduler windows settle; require dwell thresholds tied to pod age before paging. Planned downstream maintenance on Splunk indexers or HEC load balancers can intentionally grow fs_chunks under approved change tickets; suppress when change metadata matches inventory owner teams. Debug or trace logging on noisy workloads amplifies chunk counts without implying broken outputs; correlate log volume spikes at the source before resizing storage.total_limit_size. Security archive replay or disaster-recovery backfill jobs may flood inputs and grow storage.path bytes transiently; validate replay windows against skew_ratio baselines. Low-volume edge nodes naturally idle near zero fs_chunks; avoid comparing them to high-churn data centers without per-role baselines from fluentbit_pod_inventory.csv. Mis-tuned du:fs agents that scan overly broad mount points can inflate apparent bytes until search-time filters tighten to /var/lib/fluent-bit paths. OpenTelemetry scrape gaps present false calm when REST and du arms still show growth; monitor scrape success separately. Kubernetes events can duplicate during control-plane instability; cap kube_restartish_events escalation using streamstats dwell. Performance datamodel latency on newly onboarded hosts may leave perf_cpu_pct null briefly; do not mute backlog pages solely for missing CIM rows.

## References

- [Fluent Bit Manual — Buffering and Storage](https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/buffering-and-storage)
- [Fluent Bit Manual — Monitoring](https://docs.fluentbit.io/manual/administration/monitoring)
